title: Wan's Winter Comforts
description: A cozy winter-themed Minecraft mod adding four new wood types, tea, hot chocolate, and cookies!
body:
## **Wan's Winter Comforts - BETA** *** ### Content:   **Featuring 4 new types of wood sets, 🌳** * Orange wood set, * White Pine wood set, * Cinnamon wood set, * Nutmeg wood set * (Each tree giving a new spice / fruit) **![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_40a151ad-aba4-4664-8fda-233a4483e1b5.png)** ###### Image showcasing different wood | Sapling + Log   **The process of baking cookies, 🍪** * From the dough to chocolate cookies * Dough -> Rolling + Cutting -> baking -> Optional: Covering in chocolate ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_a8c04e9a-fd85-4dfe-92d4-d060974056e2.png) ###### Image showcasing the process of baking the normal cookie | showcased in mentioned sequence   **Mugs in every singe Vanilla color,** ☕ * Can be used to make Tea Mugs and Hot Chocolate Mugs ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_5e5b7332-340b-46e8-b1fa-072d9b35fced.png) ###### Image showcasing Mugs | left = Unfired Mug + Mug | right = 6/16 colored mugs   **New crops, spices and fruits, 🍊** * Ginger Crop, * Star Anise Crop, * Clove Crop, * Green / Black Tea Crop, * Cardamom Crop, * Orange, * Nutmeg, * Cinnamon, * Star Anise ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_f0c603b0-31f7-4afb-915a-05460cd2c401.png) ###### Image showcasing crop harvestings | left = (Split) Orange | middle = 3/6 spices  right = Dried green/black tea leaf   **6 types of teas,** 🍵 * Cinnamon Dream, * Ginger Hearth, * Frosted Anise, * Spiced Hearth, * Winter Ember, * Snowy Pine ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_5cc5dcc4-8321-4883-88f7-e9fe4cd9ea50.png) ###### Image showcasing different tea bags | left = empty tea nag | right = filled tea bags   **Hot Chocolate 🍫** ![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/null/description_1241ccbf-2837-44fc-adc7-b371e91e5368.png) ###### Image showcasing a Hot Chocolate Mug   ### Crafting Recipes:  

 

  • Milk bottles are obtained through milking a cow with a Glass Bottle,
  • Hot Milk / Boiling Water bottles can be obtained through a campfire

Image showcasing new filles bottles | left = milk + hot milk bottle | right = water + boiling water bottle

 

 

 

  • Hot Chocolate / Tea Mugs

Image showcasing the crafting recipe of Tea Mugs

 

Image showcasing the crafting recipe of Hot Chocolate Mugs

 

  ## THE MOD IS STILL IN BETA AND IT WOULD IMMENSELY HELP IF YOU DECIDE TO DOWNLOAD THE MOD AND GIVE FEEDBACK. MORE UPDATES COMING!  **[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/attachments/description/1108604/description_9b110890-46c6-4d75-8b92-051b5e471d6d.png)](https://discord.gg/yEM85Y7BRr)**
